Table of Contents

Item 1. Business Item 1A. Risk Factors Item 7. Management Discussion

Item 1. Business

We design accelerated computing platforms. Our reportable segments are Compute & Networking and Graphics.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Demand for our products may not meet expectations. Supply is concentrated among a few foundry partners, creating risk.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Revenue grew year over year driven by Data Center. Gross margin expanded. Liquidity remains strong.

Item 7A. Quantitative Disclosures

Interest rate risk is immaterial.
